**If this looks like Facebook changed something:** run with `-v`/`--verbose`
and paste the relevant output, or a screenshot of what the page actually
showed. This is the fastest way to confirm whether Facebook changed
Marketplace's markup/URL parameters on their end vs. a bug in this project.
